title: Clear DNA Stress Balls Toys Set - 3pcs Stress Relief Clear DNA Sensory Squeeze Balls with 48 Links Wacky Tracks – Silicone DNA Anti Stress Squishy Squeeze Balls for Better Focus
description: Product Description Discover our cute sensory and fidget toys for all ages : kids and adults. The design of our Penguin Crafts Penguin Crafts DNA Stress Ball and Wacky Track Toys set will allow your kids to pass the time and control kids with tantrums and boredom both indoors and outdoors. Our extra-long 48 links fidget chain will help create different shapes both abstract and representational. This stress relief toy set helps to develop innovative abilities and exercise kids’ imagination. Get a fun way to keep the brain focused and the hands busy with our Penguin Crafts DNA Stress Ball and Wacky Track Toys set! Our Clear DNA Sensory Balls with Wacky Track includes: - 3 PCs Clear Stress Sensory Balls – 2 purple and 1 yellow mixes - 1 PC 48 links Wacky Track-pastel green / blue Safely packed Suitable for Multiple Occasions Lightweight & convenient to carry Best Stress-Relief Stretchy Toy for Kids and Adults If you are looking for a high-quality stress-relief toy set for all ages, don’t miss a chance to get our Penguin Crafts DNA Stress Ball and Wacky Track Toys set that can be used by those who want to keep calm and be focused. These stress-relief sensory toys are great to relieve anxiety and tension. Our 4-pack clear DNA Stress Balls and Wacky Track set is suitable for kids of all ages as well as can make perfect party bag fillers to give everyone hours of enjoyment. Material: Non-toxic plastic and soft silicone Stress-relieving & develops imagination For children 3 years + Extra long 48 links Wacky Track Forget about stressful things with our Sensory Toys The Penguin Crafts DNA Stress Ball and Wacky Track Toys set contains 3 squeeze balls and 1 snap and click fidget toy which all come in different bright colours and offer endless possibilities. These high-quality stress relief DNA balls with squishy water beads will please you with their nice-to-touch and soft material. The Penguin Crafts DNA Stress Ball and Wacky Track Toys set will be a great tool for reducing stress and improving your focus and concentration anywhere you need – at school, university or at work.
